refnamediv.refpurpose: Compute KAZE descriptors for image keypoints.

listitem.para: Image from which to compute descriptors.
Feature object, normally returned by imdetect_KAZE.
One descriptor row for each supplied keypoint.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Computes KAZE descriptors for an existing set of keypoints. Use the same image and feature object used for detection.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Source reference: official OpenCV documentation. Example 1 is an adapted OpenCV workflow; Example 2 is an independent IPCV workflow.

refsection.title: Bibliography
refsection.para: OpenCV AKAZE local feature matching tutorial.
